_description: Shared model registry for all AIXIA-workspace projects. Projects resolve model family → current_version at runtime from this file. Maintained by the bi-weekly model-release crawler (scheduled trigger). See ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md §9.5 for policy.
_bootstrap_note: This is the bootstrap state from 2026-04-20. Entries marked bootstrap_unverified: true are seeded from CLAUDE Code context and should be verified on the first crawler run. Pricing drifts; registry values are authoritative — always re-read at call-time.

claude_opus.notes: UPDATED Jun 15, 2026: claude-opus-4-7 → claude-opus-4-8 (released May 28, 2026). Pricing unchanged at $5/$25 per million tokens. Fast Mode now 3× cheaper than 4.7 Fast Mode ($10/$50 per million). Key gains: SWE-Bench Pro 69.2% (vs 64.3% on 4.7), OSWorld-Verified 83.4%, ~35% fewer output tokens than 4.7 for equivalent tasks. Available on Claude API, Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, GitHub Copilot same-day. Dynamic workflows feature in Claude Code. Claude Mythos 5 exists as a trusted-access-only tier (not general API) — Fable 5 is its public-access equivalent (see claude_fable). New tokenizer note from 4.7 still applies: may use 1.0–1.35× more tokens than Opus 4.6 for the same input.

claude_fable.notes: NEW FAMILY (Jun 15, 2026). Claude Fable 5 is the public-access version of Claude Mythos 5 — Anthropic's Mythos-class model available via standard API. Released June 9, 2026. Excels at software engineering, agentic coding, knowledge work, and vision. SAFEGUARD BEHAVIOR: In high-risk domains (cybersecurity, biology, chemistry, model distillation) the model blocks responses and falls back to Claude Opus 4.8 — downstream projects must handle this graceful degradation. Pricing: $10/$50 per million input/output tokens. Prompt caching: $1/M cache hits (90% off standard input rate). Batch API: $5/$25 per million. Full 1M context at flat rate, no long-context surcharge. Model string: claude-fable-5. Claude Mythos 5 is a separately gated trusted-access tier (research programs only, not general API). AIXIA projects that need maximum reasoning/coding capability should route here rather than claude_opus, accepting the 2× cost.

claude_sonnet.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. Pricing and version stable. claude-sonnet-4-6 at $3/$15 per million remains the workhorse for user-facing chat. No Sonnet 4.7 or 4.8 detected this cycle.

claude_haiku.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. Pricing and version stable at $1/$5 per million.

deepseek_general.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. deepseek-v4-flash: 284B total / 13B active params (MoE), 1M context, Thinking+Non-Thinking dual mode. Cache hits at 1/10 standard rate. Compatible with OpenAI ChatCompletions and Anthropic API formats. Chinese-server jurisdiction — disclose in ToS. Router fallback: deepseek → claude_haiku → claude_sonnet. DeepSeek R2 remains unreleased as of this cycle (CEO not satisfied with performance per Reuters; no R2 in official API model list).

deepseek_reasoning.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. Pricing confirmed $0.55/$2.19 (cache hits: $0.14/M input). DeepSeek R2 not yet released. R1 remains ~96% cheaper than OpenAI o1 for comparable tasks. Note: deepseek_v4_pro supports Thinking mode at 1M context if R1's 64K limit is too small.

deepseek_v4_pro.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. 🚨 Reminder: 75% PROMOTIONAL DISCOUNT EXPIRED June 1, 2026 — standard rate $1.74/$3.48 per million tokens now active. Projects budgeted at the promo rate ($0.435/$0.87) face a 4× cost increase. Audit all AIXIA-workspace projects routing to this model. 1.6T total / 49B active params (large MoE), 1M context, Thinking+Non-Thinking dual mode.

gemini_pro_multimodal.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; version and pricing unchanged. WATCH: Gemini 3.5 Pro announced at Google I/O (May 19, 2026) but still in limited Vertex preview as of June 6. GA expected 'by end of June' per Sundar Pichai. When 3.5 Pro goes GA, expect: 2M token context, Deep Think reasoning mode, frontier multimodal; pricing not yet published. Do NOT update this entry to 3.5 Pro until GA confirmation. Tiered pricing: $2/$12 up to 200K tokens; $4/$18 above 200K. Gemini Pro paid-only (free tier removed April 1, 2026). YouTube URL ingest via file_data.file_uri. Deprecated: gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview and gemini-3-pro-image-preview shut down June 25, 2026.

gemini_flash.notes: 🚨 UPDATED Jun 15, 2026: gemini-3.1-flash → gemini-3.5-flash (GA at Google I/O, May 19, 2026). PRICING TRIPLED: $0.50→$1.50 input, $3.00→$9.00 output per million tokens (200% increase — >20% threshold breached). All AIXIA projects using gemini_flash must re-audit cost models immediately. Context: 1,048,576 tokens (approx. 1M, slight expansion). Cached input: $0.15/M (90% discount). Non-global regions: $1.65/$9.90. Batch API: 50% discount for async. Gemini 3.5 Flash positioned as 'most intelligent model for sustained frontier performance on agentic and coding tasks' — replaces 3.1 Flash which is being retired. Budget alternative gemini-3.1-flash-lite still available at lower pricing; flash-lite was GA'd May 7, 2026. Gemini Omni (announced I/O) is a separate video-first multimodal model; no public API pricing as of Jun 15 — not tracked yet.

openai_gpt.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; version and pricing unchanged. GPT-5.5 Instant is now the default ChatGPT model (launched ~May 5, 2026) — hallucination reduction for law/medicine/finance. GPT-5.2 deprecated June 12, 2026; conversations auto-migrated to GPT-5.5. GPT-4.5 retiring from ChatGPT June 27, 2026. Pricing reminder: $5/$30 per million (doubled from gpt-5.4 cycle). Also available: gpt-5.5-pro ($30/$180). Fine-tuning API deprecated May 2026 — any AIXIA project on fine-tuned GPT must migrate. GPT-6 confirmed for 2026 but no release date; not tracked until GA. Not currently used by AIXIA projects.

openai_reasoning.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. o4-mini outperforms o3-mini at ~50% lower cost. o3 also available ($2.00/M input, 200K context). IMPORTANT: reasoning tokens billed at output rate — effective cost 5–20× listed rate. No o5 release confirmed this cycle. Not currently used by AIXIA projects.

mistral_large.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. Mistral Large 3 2512: 262K context, EU-hosted option for data-residency-sensitive tiers. No new Large model this cycle.

mistral_small.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. Mistral Small 4 (mistral-small-2603): MoE 119B total / 6B active params, 256K context, native multimodal. Cheapest EU-residency multimodal option at $0.15/$0.60. Added Emmi AI to Mistral enterprise platform in June 2026 (physics AI for industrial engineering / digital twins) — not a new base model, an enterprise integration.

mistral_medium.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. Mistral Medium 3.5 (April 29, 2026): dense 128B open-weight; unifies instruction-following, reasoning, and coding. 256K context, EU data residency. Output cost ($7.50/M) is 5× mistral_large — only worth it when unified reasoning+coding at long context is required.

mistral_reasoning.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no change. magistral-medium-2506: $2.00/$5.00 per million tokens, 41K context. Budget option: magistral-small-2506 at $0.50/$1.50, 40K context. EU data residency via La Plateforme. Compact context (41K) suits focused reasoning — switch to mistral_medium (256K) when long context is also needed.

llama.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; no open-weight Llama release this cycle. Llama 4 Maverick remains current open-weight offering: 17B active params, 128 experts (400B total), 1M context, natively multimodal MoE. Pricing reflects third-party providers (Together AI, Fireworks, Groq, AWS Bedrock). Also: Llama 4 Scout ($0.15/$0.60, 10M context) for extreme-context tasks; Llama 4 Behemoth (288B active) still not GA. Meta launched proprietary 'Muse Spark' model (closed-source, June 2026) — NOT tracked here as it is not open-weight and not available via standard API routes relevant to AIXIA projects.

grok.notes: Verified Jun 15, 2026; version and pricing unchanged. WATCH: Grok V9-Medium (1.5T params, 3× current production scale, coding-focused trained on Cursor workflows) completed training May 25, 2026. Public API release expected mid-June 2026; no model string or API pricing published yet — do NOT update current_version until GA. Grok Imagine 1.5 Preview released June 3/11, 2026 (image generation, not a language model). Grok 5 (6T-param MoE, Colossus 2 cluster) still in training; prediction markets give ~33% probability of shipping by June 30. 🚨 Context window is 1M (not 2M) — projects needing >1M context must use gemini_pro_multimodal. Tiered pricing: requests exceeding 200K total tokens billed at higher rate. Voice STT/TTS APIs live since April 17, 2026.

routing_defaults.description: Canonical default routing for common task categories. Projects override as needed in their local CLAUDE.md.

privacy_mode_routing.description: When a project/tier enables Privacy Mode, all calls route through Claude only (no DeepSeek, no third-party-jurisdiction routes). Studio-tier Echoform users default to Privacy Mode.
